api_key.description: WorkRamp API key (Integrations page -> API), sent as a Bearer token on every request. Belongs to a specific admin user; actions are attributed to that user. Never logged.

base_url.description: WorkRamp API base URL. Defaults to the real production host (developers.workramp.com's Getting Started guide); EU customers should override to https://app.eu.workramp.com.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-200 for users; the real API's per_page/limit parameter name varies by resource, see docs.md).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages to read; matches legacy's default of 1 page when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
